name: Sustainability Report
tagline: Modern sustainability strategy deck with line-art ESG illustrations, mint highlights, black heavy type, and business-friendly report grids.

palette.description: Off-white canvas with black line work, mint-green highlights, leaf accents, and white report surfaces.

typography.style: Heavy rounded sans display with neutral sans body, matching the source business sustainability preview.

best_for: Sustainability strategy, ESG progress reports, CSR updates, operational improvement plans, and green business pitches.
avoid_for: Luxury editorial decks, nightlife or youth campaigns, and presentations needing dense legal or finance-document formality.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Sustainability Strategies for Business
source_inspiration.notes: Independent page-by-page HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview style: black Poppins-like headings, white canvas, mint blocks, corner marks, line-art business ecology icons, tables, metrics, and implementation pages. It does not reuse source slide assets.
